title: Fig. 4 in The relationships among Leishmania infantum and phyllostomid bats assessed by histopathological and molecular assays
author: Silva, Alanderson Rodrigues da
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Fig. 4. Photomicrography of spleen of an adult male Artibeus planirostris (A) and Carollia perspicillata (B) qPCR Leishmania infantum positive. No amastigotes forms were found. Note tingible bodies macrophages in the germinal center containing phagocytic apoptotic cells (arrow) and apoptotic cells (arrowhead), H&E, 40x objective.
